surgery_class_name: Special Major Surgery (ผ่าตัดใหญ่พิเศษ)
notes: Highest complexity surgery requiring specialized teams and equipment. Includes cardiac bypass (CABG), organ transplantation, complex neurosurgery, major vascular reconstruction. Requires ICU post-op. ThaiDRG RW typically > 4.0.

surgery_class_name: Major Surgery Class 1 (ผ่าตัดใหญ่ ระดับ 1)
notes: Major invasive surgery entering body cavities with significant complexity. Includes thoracotomy, laparotomy, total joint replacement, craniotomy, major spinal surgery. Requires general anesthesia and operating room. ThaiDRG RW typically 2.0-4.0.

surgery_class_name: Major Surgery Class 2 (ผ่าตัดใหญ่ ระดับ 2)
notes: Moderate complexity surgery entering body cavities. Includes appendectomy, cholecystectomy, hernia repair, cesarean section, hysterectomy. Requires general or regional anesthesia. ThaiDRG RW typically 1.0-2.0.

surgery_class_name: Major Surgery Class 3 (ผ่าตัดใหญ่ ระดับ 3)
notes: Lower complexity surgery, may be superficial but requires operating room conditions. Includes wound debridement, skin grafts, excisional biopsy under general anesthesia, fracture fixation. ThaiDRG RW typically 0.5-1.0.

surgery_class_name: Special Procedure (หัตถการพิเศษ)
notes: High complexity non-surgical interventional procedures. Includes cardiac catheterization, percutaneous coronary intervention (PCI), interventional radiology, electrophysiology studies, complex endovascular procedures. Requires specialized equipment and catheterization lab.

surgery_class_name: Major Procedure Class 1 (หัตถการใหญ่ ระดับ 1)
notes: Significant non-surgical procedures requiring sedation or specialized skills. Includes endoscopy with biopsy (EGD/colonoscopy), bronchoscopy, lumbar puncture, bone marrow biopsy, thoracentesis, paracentesis. May require procedural sedation.

surgery_class_name: Minor Procedure Class 2 (หัตถการเล็ก ระดับ 2)
notes: Simple surgical procedures on skin and subcutaneous tissue. Includes incision and drainage (I&D), simple excision of superficial lesions, removal of foreign body, circumcision, nail removal. Local anesthesia, minimal blood loss, low risk.

surgery_class_name: Minor Procedure Class 3 (หัตถการเล็ก ระดับ 3)
notes: Basic clinical procedures requiring minimal intervention. Includes wound suturing, injection (IM/IV/subcutaneous), wound dressing, catheterization, nasogastric tube insertion, simple splinting. Can be performed at bedside or outpatient setting.
